title: Push main (i54-closeout, 12 commits) to origin
action: Push local main to origin/main: 12 commits from the i54-closeout feature (cells 1-10, scribing sync, close). Mode-gate record: 0 flags, 0 product files, one direct outward-facing task — tiny. User explicitly requested the push; feature closed unreviewed with a review candidate registered. CI on push runs the full suite and auto-files verify-red if red.

truths: origin/main equals local HEAD after the push

verify: git fetch -q origin main && [ "$(git rev-parse origin/main)" = "$(git rev-parse HEAD)" ] && echo push-verified

trace.verify_output: git push origin main: 8e26948..2f11cb4 main -> main; origin/main == HEAD; push-verified
